title: Next Greater Element
coreIdea: For each element in an array, find the first element to its right that is greater than it. A monotonic decreasing stack efficiently tracks candidates, popping elements whenever a greater one is found to assign their answer.
recognitionCues: asks for next greater/smaller element for each array element
brute force would be O(n^2), problem hints at better complexity
answer relates each element to a future element in the array
approach: Traverse array from right to left (or left to right with a stack of indices). Maintain a stack of elements/indices in decreasing order. For each new element, pop all smaller elements from stack (they've found their next greater element), then push current element. Elements remaining unmatched get -1.
